title: stelis biserrula
intro: Stelis biserrula is a type of flowering plant, specifically a species of orchid in the genus Stelis. It is native to the Americas and has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for various health conditions, including skin irritations and infections. Stelis biserrula can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
